backstory.original: Hailing from the Spine of the World, Bruenor is the leader of Clan Battlehammer. He is close friends with the celebrated drow Drizzt Do'Urden and the halfling Regis. Rounding out the 'Companions of the Hall' are his two adopted human children: Catti-Brie and Wulfgar.
backstory.display: 布鲁诺来自世界之脊，是战锤氏族的领袖，他与著名的卓尔精灵崔斯特·杜垩登以及半身人瑞吉斯是亲密好友。在“秘银五侠”中，还有他收养的两个人类孩子，凯蒂布莉儿和沃夫加。

description.original: Bruenor slashes at the closest enemy with his axe.
description.display: 布鲁诺用斧头劈砍距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to the closest enemy.
description.display: 布鲁诺对距离最近的敌人打出毁灭性的一击。

longDescription.original: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to a single enemy using his shield and axe.
longDescription.display: 布鲁诺用他的盾牌和斧头对一名敌人打出毁灭性的一击。

description.desc: Increase the damage of $target by $amount% for each adjacent Champion
$target每与一名勇士同列，即提升 $amount% 伤害

tipText.original: Bruenor does more damage if he's adjacent to more Champions. Place him next to as many Champions as you can.
tipText.display: 相邻的勇士越多，布鲁诺造成的伤害越高。尽量将其放置在更多勇士身边。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the same column as $source by $(amount)%
与$source同列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Bruenor increases the damage of Champions in the same column as him. Place him in the same column as your most damaging Champions.
tipText.display: 布鲁诺使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。尽量将其与杀伤力最强的勇士放在同一纵队。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% for 10 sec whenever a Champion within 2 slots of Bruenor is attacked (stacks up to 25 times)
当距离布鲁诺 2 格范围内的勇士被攻击时，在 10 秒内提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $amount%（最多可堆叠 25 层）

specializationDescription.original: Bruenor readies his shield, increasing the damage of those in the same column as him when nearby friends come under attack.
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁诺举起盾牌。当附近盟友受到攻击时，使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。

specializationDescription.original: Bruenor focuses on developing his group tactics, constantly increasing the damage of those in the same column as him.
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁诺专注于制定小队战术，不断提高同纵队勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% for each Dwarf (other than $source_hero) in the formation
阵型中每有一位矮人（除$source_hero外），$(upgrade_name id)的效果即提升 $amount%
Your formation gains one Mithral Hall stack. Bruenor increases the effect of Rally by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得一层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使布鲁诺的“振奋”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 布鲁诺秘银厅堆叠层数

description.original: Aye, a selfless dwarf I am.
description.display: 是的，我是个无私的矮人。

description.original: Well don't go gettin' all sappy on me.
description.display: 好了，不要再跟我废话了。

description.original: Get beside me. This is gonna be messy.
description.display: 到我身边来，马上要变得混乱了。

description.original: Yer finally fightin' smart!
description.display: 你可算会用脑子战斗了！

description.original: King 'er not, we need to rally these dwarves!
description.display: 不管是不是为了国王，我们得把这些矮人召集起来！

description.original: Did someone call fer Faerûn's strongest dwarf?
description.display: 有人自称是费伦最强壮的矮人？

description.original: I play a mean Binwin.
description.display: 我扮演凶狠的宾温。

description.original: What? I ain't wise enough for ye?
description.display: 什么？我还不够聪明？

description.original: A few gnolls won't scare me!
description.display: 区区几个豺狼人吓不倒我！

description.original: Off yer rump and get back out there!
description.display: 抬起你的屁股滚出去！

description.original: Stand yer ground! They can't defeat us together!
description.display: 守住阵线！他们无法击败团结的我们！

description.original: 'Tis an honor ta fight alongside ya.
description.display: 与你并肩作战是我的荣幸。

description.original: It's good to be the King!
description.display: 当王的感觉真棒！

description.original: It isn't much, but it'll get the job done.
description.display: 虽然并不完美，但还能用。

description.original: So sharp I can skin dinner with it.
description.display: 锋利得可以用来取代刀叉。

description.original: I've lost count of the number of goblins slaughtered by its razor edge.
description.display: 数不清有多少地精成了此斧的斧下亡魂。

description.original: This axe has seen a thousand battles, and been victorious in every one.
description.display: 此斧头征战沙场千百次，无一不是凯旋而归。

description.original: They're a bit heavy, but they keep my beard in check.
description.display: 虽然是有点沉，但能够确保我的胡子整整齐齐。

description.original: Lighter than your average clips, they let my beard swing furiously when I attack.
description.display: 比一般的夹子轻盈，而且能够确保我每次挥击武器时，胡子也会随之摆动。

description.original: Crafted from a meteorite that fell near Icewind Dale.
description.display: 这是采用冰风谷的某块陨石为材料打造而成的。

name.original: Gold Beard Clips of the Clan

description.original: Ancient family clips found in the depths of the Mithral Hall.
description.display: 这是在秘银厅深处找到的上古家族夹子。

description.original: It'll hold up your pants, if you don't move around too quickly.
description.display: 只要小心翼翼地移动，这腰带绝对可以捆得住裤子不往下滑。

description.original: It's seen better days, but it still does the trick.
description.display: 虽然是破旧了一点，还是能派上用场的。

description.original: It's quite slimming!
description.display: 戴上后整个人看起来瘦多了！

name.original: Golden Hide Belt of the Ancestors

description.original: An ancient family belt recovered from a Battlehammer heirloom cache.
description.display: 这是从某个战锤家传宝库中所发现的古老家族腰带。

description.original: A simple ring with little magical power.
description.display: 简简单单的一枚戒指，没有什么魔力。

description.original: A shiny ring that seems to radiate mild heat on its own.
description.display: 闪闪发亮的一枚戒指，似乎在散发着微弱的热能。

description.original: A magical ring crafted from a fallen meteorite.
description.display: 这是采用某块陨石所打造而成的魔法戒指。

description.original: Specially crafted by the craftsmen in Mirabar as a peace offering to Clan Battlehammer.
description.display: 这是米拉巴的匠人打造给战锤部落的和解礼物。

description.original: Looks like someone took a warhammer to this.
description.display: 这块盾牌似乎被战锤锤击过。

description.original: If you can get it up in time, it'll do the job.
description.display: 你要是举得动它，它肯定能保你安全。

description.original: It's strong enough to stop a blow from a raging giant.
description.display: 它可以抵挡愤怒巨人的全力一击。

description.original: A magical shield with secret and mysterious powers.
description.display: 这面魔法盾牌蕴含着许多秘密和神奇的力量。

description.original: To be fair, I think it's supposed to be broken.
description.display: 说实话，我觉得这头盔本来就是长这样子的。

description.original: Someone needs to get some spit and polish on this thing.
description.display: 得找个人来擦洗下这玩意。

description.original: Stronger than steel, and far lighter.
description.display: 强度比钢铁高，但却更加轻盈。

description.original: This helm has seen Bruenor through a hundred sticky situations.
description.display: 此头盔陪伴过布鲁诺出生入死百余次。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Dwarf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Hailing from the Spine of the World, Bruenor is the leader of Clan Battlehammer. He is close friends with the celebrated drow Drizzt Do'Urden and the halfling Regis. Rounding out the 'Companions of the Hall' are his two adopted human children: Catti-Brie and Wulfgar.
布鲁诺来自世界之脊，是战锤氏族的领袖，他与著名的卓尔精灵崔斯特·杜垩登以及半身人瑞吉斯是亲密好友。在“秘银五侠”中，还有他收养的两个人类孩子，凯蒂布莉儿和沃夫加。

original.name: Slice
original.description: Bruenor slashes at the closest enemy with his axe.

display.name: 劈砍
display.description: 布鲁诺用斧头劈砍距离最近的敌人。

original.name: Bash
original.description: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to the closest enemy.
original.long_description: Bruenor delivers a devastating blow to a single enemy using his shield and axe.

display.name: 猛击
display.description: 布鲁诺对距离最近的敌人打出毁灭性的一击。
display.long_description: 布鲁诺用他的盾牌和斧头对一名敌人打出毁灭性的一击。

original.name: Inspired
original.tip_text: Bruenor does more damage if he's adjacent to more Champions. Place him next to as many Champions as you can.

display.name: 鼓舞
display.tip_text: 相邻的勇士越多，布鲁诺造成的伤害越高。尽量将其放置在更多勇士身边。

original.name: Rally
original.tip_text: Bruenor increases the damage of Champions in the same column as him. Place him in the same column as your most damaging Champions.

display.name: 振奋
display.tip_text: 布鲁诺使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。尽量将其与杀伤力最强的勇士放在同一纵队。

original.name: Shield Master
original.specialization_description: Bruenor readies his shield, increasing the damage of those in the same column as him when nearby friends come under attack.

display.name: 盾牌大师
display.specialization_description: 布鲁诺举起盾牌。当附近盟友受到攻击时，使同纵队勇士的伤害提高。

original.specialization_description: Bruenor focuses on developing his group tactics, constantly increasing the damage of those in the same column as him.

display.specialization_description: 布鲁诺专注于制定小队战术，不断提高同纵队勇士的伤害。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Aye, a selfless dwarf I am.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 是的，我是个无私的矮人。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Well don't go gettin' all sappy on me.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 好了，不要再跟我废话了。

original.name: Rallying Cry
original.description: Get beside me. This is gonna be messy.

display.name: 集结呐喊
display.description: 到我身边来，马上要变得混乱了。

original.name: Rally Master
original.description: Yer finally fightin' smart!

display.name: 振奋大师
display.description: 你可算会用脑子战斗了！

original.name: Observant
original.description: What? I ain't wise enough for ye?

display.name: 洞察
display.description: 什么？我还不够聪明？

original.name: Actor
original.description: I play a mean Binwin.

display.name: 演员
display.description: 我扮演凶狠的宾温。

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: A few gnolls won't scare me!

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 区区几个豺狼人吓不倒我！

original.name: Athlete
original.description: Did someone call fer Faerûn's strongest dwarf?

display.name: 运动员
display.description: 有人自称是费伦最强壮的矮人？

original.name: King of Mithral Hall
original.description: King 'er not, we need to rally these dwarves!

display.name: 秘银厅之王
display.description: 不管是不是为了国王，我们得把这些矮人召集起来！

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Off yer rump and get back out there!

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 抬起你的屁股滚出去！

original.name: To Your King!
original.description: Stand yer ground! They can't defeat us together!

display.name: 到你们的王身边来！
display.description: 守住阵线！他们无法击败团结的我们！

original.name: Hall of the Mountain King
original.description: 'Tis an honor ta fight alongside ya.

display.name: 山王宫殿
display.description: 与你并肩作战是我的荣幸。

original.name: King of the Hall
original.description: It's good to be the King!

display.name: 秘银厅之王
display.description: 当王的感觉真棒！

original.name: Chipped Axe
original.description: It isn't much, but it'll get the job done.

display.name: 有缺口的斧头
display.description: 虽然并不完美，但还能用。

original.name: Sharpened Axe
original.description: So sharp I can skin dinner with it.

display.name: 磨过的斧头
display.description: 锋利得可以用来取代刀叉。

original.name: Well Used Axe
original.description: I've lost count of the number of goblins slaughtered by its razor edge.

display.name: 频繁使用的斧头
display.description: 数不清有多少地精成了此斧的斧下亡魂。

original.name: Many-notched Axe
original.description: This axe has seen a thousand battles, and been victorious in every one.

display.name: 很多缺口的斧头
display.description: 此斧头征战沙场千百次，无一不是凯旋而归。

original.name: Iron Beard Clips
original.description: They're a bit heavy, but they keep my beard in check.

display.name: 铁质胡须夹
display.description: 虽然是有点沉，但能够确保我的胡子整整齐齐。

original.name: Steel Beard Clips
original.description: Lighter than your average clips, they let my beard swing furiously when I attack.

display.name: 钢质胡须夹
display.description: 比一般的夹子轻盈，而且能够确保我每次挥击武器时，胡子也会随之摆动。

original.name: Dark Iron Beard Clips
original.description: Crafted from a meteorite that fell near Icewind Dale.

display.name: 黑铁胡须夹
display.description: 这是采用冰风谷的某块陨石为材料打造而成的。

original.name: Gold Beard Clips of the Clan
original.description: Ancient family clips found in the depths of the Mithral Hall.

display.name: 氏族黄金胡须夹
display.description: 这是在秘银厅深处找到的上古家族夹子。

original.name: Frayed Belt
original.description: It'll hold up your pants, if you don't move around too quickly.

display.name: 磨损的腰带
display.description: 只要小心翼翼地移动，这腰带绝对可以捆得住裤子不往下滑。

original.name: Faded Leather Belt
original.description: It's seen better days, but it still does the trick.

display.name: 褪色的皮腰带
display.description: 虽然是破旧了一点，还是能派上用场的。

original.name: Thick Sturdy Belt
original.description: It's quite slimming!

display.name: 厚实牢固的腰带
display.description: 戴上后整个人看起来瘦多了！

original.name: Golden Hide Belt of the Ancestors
original.description: An ancient family belt recovered from a Battlehammer heirloom cache.

display.name: 先祖黄金皮革腰带
display.description: 这是从某个战锤家传宝库中所发现的古老家族腰带。

original.name: Plain Iron Ring
original.description: A simple ring with little magical power.

display.name: 朴素的铁质戒指
display.description: 简简单单的一枚戒指，没有什么魔力。

original.name: Shiny Steel Ring
original.description: A shiny ring that seems to radiate mild heat on its own.

display.name: 闪亮的钢质戒指
display.description: 闪闪发亮的一枚戒指，似乎在散发着微弱的热能。

original.name: Dark Iron Ring
original.description: A magical ring crafted from a fallen meteorite.

display.name: 黑铁戒指
display.description: 这是采用某块陨石所打造而成的魔法戒指。

original.name: Golden Sigil Ring of Dwarves
original.description: Specially crafted by the craftsmen in Mirabar as a peace offering to Clan Battlehammer.

display.name: 矮人族黄金印章戒指
display.description: 这是米拉巴的匠人打造给战锤部落的和解礼物。

original.name: Dented Shield
original.description: Looks like someone took a warhammer to this.

display.name: 凹陷的盾牌
display.description: 这块盾牌似乎被战锤锤击过。

original.name: Heavy Shield
original.description: If you can get it up in time, it'll do the job.

display.name: 沉重的盾牌
display.description: 你要是举得动它，它肯定能保你安全。

original.name: Strong Shield
original.description: It's strong enough to stop a blow from a raging giant.

display.name: 强大的盾牌
display.description: 它可以抵挡愤怒巨人的全力一击。

original.name: Shield of Foaming Ale
original.description: A magical shield with secret and mysterious powers.

display.name: 起沫啤酒盾牌
display.description: 这面魔法盾牌蕴含着许多秘密和神奇的力量。

original.name: Broken Helm
original.description: To be fair, I think it's supposed to be broken.

display.name: 破损的头盔
display.description: 说实话，我觉得这头盔本来就是长这样子的。

original.name: Scuffed Helm
original.description: Someone needs to get some spit and polish on this thing.

display.name: 磨损的头盔
display.description: 得找个人来擦洗下这玩意。

original.name: Mithral Helm
original.description: Stronger than steel, and far lighter.

display.name: 秘银头盔
display.description: 强度比钢铁高，但却更加轻盈。

original.name: Gilded Helm of Clan Battlehammer
original.description: This helm has seen Bruenor through a hundred sticky situations.

display.name: 战锤部落的镀金盔
display.description: 此头盔陪伴过布鲁诺出生入死百余次。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Dwarf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有矮人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位力量大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%
使所有中立阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
